title: Litany of St. Rita
description: A responsive litany to St. Rita, intercessor in difficult and impossible cases.
body:
LITANY OF ST. RITA OF CASCIA

Lord, have mercy,

Christ, have mercy,

Lord, have mercy,

Response: Have mercy on us

God the Father of Heaven,

God the Son, Redeemer of the world,

God the Holy Spirit,

Holy Trinity, one God,

Response: Pray for us

Mary Immaculate, Mother of God

Mary, Mother and comforter of those who suffer

Mary, Queen of all Saints

Mary, beloved intercessor of St. Rita

Response: Pray for us

St. Rita, gift from Heaven:

St. Rita, our powerful intercessor:

St. Rita, endowed with glory:

St. Rita, admired from your childhood:

St. Rita, lover of solitude:

St. Rita, model of purity of heart:

St. Rita, model of all gentleness:

St. Rita, model of a good wife:

St. Rita, excellent model of a devoted mother:

St. Rita, model of true forgiveness:

St. Rita, living model of self-denial:

St. Rita, mirror of religious life:

St. Rita, mirror of obedience:

St. Rita, admirable in patience:

St. Rita, hero of self-sacrifice:

St. Rita, witness in doing penance:

St. Rita, holy widow:

St. Rita, generous to the poor:

St. Rita, generous to the poor:

St. Rita, zealous in answering the holy call:

St. Rita, miraculously admitted into the convent:

St. Rita, fragrance of myrrh:

St. Rita, garden of every virtue:

St. Rita, beloved of Jesus Crucified:

St. Rita, wounded by a thorn on your forehead:

St. Rita, beloved daughter of the Virgin Mary:

St. Rita, thirsty for Divine Love:

St. Rita, clothed with glory:

St. Rita, pearl of Heaven:

St. Rita, glory of the Order of St. Augustine:

St. Rita, precious treasure of Umbria:

St. Rita, powerful in holiness:

St. Rita, relief of those in distress:

St. Rita, comforter of those who suffer:

St. Rita, anchor of salvation:

St. Rita, intercessor for the sick:

St. Rita, intercessor in impossible cases:

St. Rita, refuge of those in danger:

St. Rita, powerful help for all:

St. Rita, wonder of the world:

St. Rita, received joyfully into Heaven:

Lamb of God, who takes away the sins of the world, spare us, O Lord

Lamb of God, who takes away the sins of the world, graciously hear us, O Lord

Lamb of God, who takes away the sins of the world, have mercy on us

V: You have marked, O Lord, your servant Rita

R: With the seal of love and suffering

LET US PRAY:

O God, who in your unfailing goodness have been pleased to hear the intercession of your servant Rita, grant us through her intercession those things that are impossible by human strength. Have mercy on us who suffer, and help all who do not believe in you to know that you are the reward of the humble, the comforter of all who are afraid, and the strength of the weak. We ask this through Christ our Lord. Amen
